title: Review Information Categories on the HMI Calculations Screen
summary: Use the HMI Calculations screen to identify and review the documented categories of operational information shown on the Tilt Tray overview.
when_to_use: Use this reference procedure when an operator needs to confirm that the HMI Calculations screen presents the documented information categories on the Tilt Tray overview: system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to infer meanings, thresholds, or corrective actions for the displayed information because the source does not provide them.
Do not use this procedure to validate individual field names, values, or interpretation rules because the source does not provide them.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the HMI Calculations screen, identify the documented information categories shown, and record or communicate the category names using source-provided terminology only.

safety_notes: This candidate is marked support safe.
Use only the documented category names from the source when recording or communicating what is shown on the screen.
Do not infer meanings, thresholds, or corrective actions for displayed information because the source does not provide them.
access_or_tools_needed: Figure 4-6 or equivalent documented screen reference

system_preconditions: The user is able to access the "ACB System" screen.
The HMI Calculations screen is available for viewing from the "ACB System" screen.

visual_references.description: HMI Calculations screen capture showing the screen used to view system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
ACB System screen reference for navigation context before opening HMI Calculations.

steps.title: Open the HMI Calculations screen
steps.purpose: Access the documented screen used to review the listed information categories.
steps.instruction: From the "ACB System" screen, press HMI CALCULATIONS to access the "Tilt Tray" overview screen.
steps.expected_result: The HMI Calculations screen is displayed.
steps.healthy_condition: The user reaches the HMI Calculations screen associated with the Tilt Tray overview.
steps.failure_condition: The HMI Calculations screen cannot be accessed from the "ACB System" screen or a different screen is displayed.

actions.label: Open HMI Calculations
actions.exact_action: Press HMI CALCULATIONS from the "ACB System" screen to access the "Tilt Tray" overview screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The HMI Calculations screen reached from the "ACB System" screen.
The "ACB System" screen used as the navigation starting point.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the displayed screen does not match the documented HMI Calculations screen context.
Escalate if HMI CALCULATIONS cannot be accessed from the "ACB System" screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Users press HMI CALCULATIONS from the "ACB System" screen to access the "Tilt Tray" overview screen.
Figure 4-6, titled "HMI Calculations Screen," appears on page 35... users press HMI CALCULATIONS from the "ACB System" screen to access the "Tilt Tray" overview screen.

steps.title: Identify the documented information areas
steps.purpose: Locate the categories of information the source says are presented on the HMI Calculations screen.
steps.instruction: Review the displayed HMI Calculations screen and identify the information areas associated with system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
steps.expected_result: The operator can identify the three documented information categories on the screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The visible screen content corresponds to system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
steps.failure_condition: One or more of the documented information categories cannot be identified on the displayed screen.

actions.label: Identify information categories
actions.exact_action: Identify the displayed information areas associated with system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The areas of the HMI Calculations screen that correspond to system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the displayed screen does not show the documented information categories.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "HMI Calculations" screen provides information pertaining to system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
The HMI Calculations screen groups displayed information into system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.

steps.title: Compare visible content to documented categories
steps.purpose: Confirm that the displayed screen content matches the categories named in the source.
steps.instruction: Compare the visible screen content to the documented categories: system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
steps.expected_result: The displayed content aligns with the three documented category names from the source.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen content can be matched to all three documented categories using the source terminology.
steps.failure_condition: The visible content does not align with the documented categories or cannot be matched using the source terminology.

actions.label: Compare to source categories
actions.exact_action: Compare the visible screen content to the documented categories: system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The overall HMI Calculations screen content for comparison against the documented category names.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the displayed screen does not show the documented information categories.
Stop and do not infer meanings, thresholds, or corrective actions for the displayed information because the source does not provide them.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "HMI Calculations" screen provides information pertaining to system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
The source names the information categories but does not provide field names, values, or interpretation rules.

steps.title: Record or communicate the category names
steps.purpose: Document or report which source-defined information categories are being viewed without adding unsupported interpretation.
steps.instruction: Record or communicate which of the documented information categories are being viewed, using only the source-provided category names.
steps.expected_result: The viewed categories are recorded or communicated as system operations, bin statistics, and/or tipper statistics using source terminology only.
steps.healthy_condition: The communication or record uses only the documented category names from the source.
steps.failure_condition: The communication includes inferred meanings, thresholds, corrective actions, or unsupported category names.

actions.label: Record documented categories
actions.exact_action: Record or communicate which of the documented information categories are being viewed, using only the source-provided category names.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The HMI Calculations screen while confirming the category names to record or communicate.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if recording or communication would require inferred meanings, thresholds, or corrective actions not provided by the source.
Escalate if the displayed screen does not show the documented information categories.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "HMI Calculations" screen provides information pertaining to system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
Do not infer meanings, thresholds, or corrective actions for the displayed information because the source does not provide them.

success_criteria: The HMI Calculations screen is accessed from the "ACB System" screen.
The operator confirms that the screen presents information related to system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
Any record or communication uses only the documented category names from the source.
healthy_conditions: The HMI Calculations screen is displayed.
Visible content corresponds to system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
The operator can confirm the documented categories without adding unsupported interpretation.
failure_conditions: The HMI Calculations screen cannot be accessed from the "ACB System" screen.
The displayed screen does not show the documented information categories.
The user attempts to infer meanings, thresholds, field definitions, or corrective actions not provided by the source.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the displayed screen does not show the documented information categories.
Escalate if HMI CALCULATIONS cannot be accessed from the "ACB System" screen.
If additional interpretation of values, thresholds, or corrective actions is needed, escalate because the source does not provide that guidance.
